raid1.description: Phase Daggers gain a chance to Ricochet. Critical Hits grant a stack of Misery for a duration, increasing Skill Damage. Misery can stack up to 50 times.
raid1.red_text: May thy knife chip and shatter.

dlc1.description: When Vex activates an Action Skill or Command Skill open a Blood Rift for a duration. Maximum of 2 active Blood Rifts at a time.Blood Rifts rapidly fire Remnant Minions, dealing [kinetic_icon][kinetic]Kinetic Gun Damage[/kinetic] based on  her Current Weapon when spawned.
dlc1.red_text: No need to waste such sweet suffering.
